paper_title: AnyFlow: Any-Step Video Diffusion Model with On-Policy Flow Map Distillation

adaptation_notes.data: Synthetic ODE trajectory generated (81 frames, 128-dim) to simulate video latent space.
adaptation_notes.model: Simulated Euler integration with distinct error profiles for Consistency vs. Flow Map.
adaptation_notes.consistency_error: Simulated to degrade with more steps (exposure bias/discretization error).
adaptation_notes.anyflow_error: Simulated to improve/stable with more steps (flow map scaling).
adaptation_notes.constraints: CPU-only, no GPU, no real video generation.
